w:r.w:t: The objective of this project is to build a fully intelligent AI-powered Website Sales Agent that functions as a digital business representative for a company’s website. The system is not a traditional chatbot or helpdesk assistant. Instead, it is designed to behave like a trained human sales executive who understands the company’s business, communicates with visitors, guides them, answers their queries, and converts them into customers or qualified leads.

The AI agent will be deployed directly on a website using a lightweight embedded widget and will automatically interact with website visitors in real time. It will greet users, understand their intent, ask discovery questions, recommend services or products, navigate website pages, and assist them through decision-making and checkout or meeting booking.

The system will be powered by a Large Language Model (LLM) and a custom business knowledge training layer. The AI will be trained using the company’s actual data, including website content, service offerings, pricing structures, documentation, previous proposals, FAQs, and databases. As a result, the agent will provide contextual and business-aware responses rather than generic chatbot replies.

Initially, the product will be built for IT and software development companies (such as agencies offering websites, mobile apps, SaaS platforms, and custom software). In the long term, the system will be released as a Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) platform so any business (e-commerce, education, healthcare, consulting, etc.) can create their own branded AI sales representative and deploy it without technical knowledge.

The core purpose of the system is to automate sales conversations, improve user engagement, reduce manual sales workload, increase website conversion rates, and ensure that every visitor is handled instantly 24/7.

The Chatbot acts as an intelligent assistant within the platform, helping users interact with the system more efficiently and understand the insights generated from the data. It assists users in navigating the platform, explaining features, and answering questions related to traffic conditions, road quality, flood risks, and environmental exposure across different corridors or road segments. The chatbot can help users generate reports, interpret analytics, and quickly identify key disruptions or trends within the selected time period. By simplifying access to insights and guiding users through the platform’s capabilities, the chatbot improves usability and enables decision-makers to extract actionable information from the system more quickly.

The Super Admin is the highest authority within the platform and has complete control over the system. This role is responsible for managing the overall platform, including client organizations, users, system configurations, and data operations. The Super Admin can create and manage organizations, assign roles such as Client Owners and Client Users, and control access levels across the platform. They oversee the data ingestion pipeline to ensure that vehicle-collected data such as GPS, sensor, and environmental inputs are being processed correctly. Additionally, the Super Admin manages API access, monitors system performance, configures alert rules, and generates high-level reports. This role ensures the platform operates smoothly, securely, and remains scalable as more organizations and data sources are added.
3.0 Functional Requirements of Chatbot and User:
The product is designed to simulate a real human employee inside a website.
Instead of a visitor browsing the website alone, the visitor is accompanied by a trained digital representative that:
• Reports analytics to the business owner
The AI agent, therefore, acts as:
Sales Executive + Product Consultant + Website Guide + Lead Generator + Business Analyst
This product is not a CRM and not an FAQ bot.
It is a conversational business operator.
The complete system operates in four main stages:
When a business subscribes to the platform, they create an account and receives an admin panel.
During onboarding, the business provides essential details:
• Sales objectives (lead generation, booking, purchase, consultation) etc
The system prepares a dedicated workspace for that business.
The most critical feature of the product is the AI learning process.
The AI agent becomes intelligent by learning the business’s real knowledge.
The platform allows multiple training sources:
The AI then understands actual business operations.
After ingestion, the AI forms a structured knowledge base.
This allows it to answer accurately and contextually.
Once training is complete, the platform generates a small JavaScript widget code.
The business only needs to paste this code into their website.
• The AI agent appears as a floating chat icon
The business can fully personalize the agent:
Multilingual conversation support (e.g., English, Hindi, and other languages).
This makes the AI appear as a branded company representative rather than a generic bot.
7. Live Visitor Interaction (Full Journey will be coming later on)
When a visitor lands on the website:
Navigates the website on behalf of the user.
The visitor does not need to manually browse — the AI guides them.
The AI performs real sales activities:
It behaves like a trained salesperson.
The widget does not immediately attack the user.
Are you looking to build something or just exploring ideas?”
I need a website/ I want an app/ I need software/ I want an e-commerce site/ I need a redesign.
Great! I’d love to help 😊 Is this for a brand-new business or one you already run?
Nice — websites are a great place to start. Is your business new or already operating?
Awesome 👍 Are you starting something fresh, or do you already have a business running?
Perfect! Can I ask — is this your first business or an existing one you want to take online?
That’s exciting 🙂 Is this a new venture or an established business?
Sure, I can guide you. May I know if the website is for a new business or an existing company?
Absolutely. Is the website intended for a startup or for a business you already operate?
Understood. Are you launching a new venture or improving your current business presence?
Happy to assist. Is this your first online presence or an upgrade for your current business?
Great — let me understand better. Is your business already operational?
Nice! Tell me — what kind of business are we building this for?
Sounds good 🙂 What do you do, and is the business already running?
Cool! What’s the business about — something new or something you already have?
That’s a good step. Are customers already coming to you offline?
Interesting! Are you starting fresh or moving your current business online?
Perfect — a website can really boost inquiries. Is your business already getting customers?
Great decision 👍 Are you planning to launch a business or grow an existing one?
Nice! I can suggest the right type of website — first tell me, is your business already active?
Good choice 🙂 Are you trying to get your first customers or bring more customers?
Excellent! Let me recommend the right setup. Do you already run the business?
Sure 🙂 May I ask what you’re planning to use the website for?
I can help with that. What kind of business do you have in mind?
Of course! Tell me a little about your business idea.
Happy to help 👋 What are you thinking of creating?
No problem at all — what would you like the website to do for you?
User: I have an idea/ I want to start something online/ I don’t know what I need/ Can you guide me?/How to start a business online?
That’s exciting 😊 Tell me a bit about your idea — what are you thinking of starting?
I’d be happy to guide you. What kind of business do you have in mind?
Nice! Many businesses actually begin exactly this way. What are you planning to offer?
Sure, let’s figure it out together 👍 What’s the idea?
Great — you don’t need to know the technical part yet. Just tell me what you want to create.
I can definitely help. Is it a product you want to sell or a service you want to provide?
Perfect! First step is understanding your goal. What are you hoping to build?
Good starting point 🙂 What problem are you trying to solve for customers?
No worries at all — most people come here at the idea stage. Tell me about it.
That’s actually the best time to talk. What kind of business are you thinking about?
Let’s start simple — do you want to sell products, offer services, or build an app idea?
Interesting! Who do you imagine as your customers?
Okay 👍 Are you planning something local or online nationwide?
Do you already have a business name or still deciding?
Are you planning to run it alone or with a team?
Would customers book, order, or just contact you?
Are you thinking website, mobile app, or you’re not sure yet?
Do you want this as a side business or full-time?
Have you already started anything or still at planning stage?
Don’t worry — you don’t need to know technology. That’s our job 🙂
Many successful businesses started exactly with “I just have an idea.”
I’ll help you understand what you actually need — website, app, or system.
You’re at the right place — we usually guide clients from zero to launch.
First we understand your idea, then we suggest the simplest way to start.
Most people think they need an app, but often a website works better initially.
We’ll keep it simple and practical for your budget.
You focus on the business — we handle the technical side.
I won’t push anything unnecessary; we’ll choose only what you need.
Starting online can feel confusing — I’ll break it down step by step.
Usually, online businesses start with a website to test the idea.
An app normally comes later after customers start using the service.
First we validate your idea, then we build the platform.
The goal is not just launching — it’s getting customers.
A simple setup can often start generating leads quickly.
We normally recommend starting small and scaling later.
The right platform depends on how customers will interact with you.
Many startups overspend early — we help you avoid that.
We’ll choose the fastest way to bring your first customers.
You don’t need a big system initially — just a working model.
If you’d like, I can suggest a basic plan for your idea.
I can help you outline what features you actually need.
I can have our consultant quickly review your idea and guide you.
We can even tell you the estimated cost range once I understand it.
Want me to help you shape the idea into a launch plan?
I can prepare a simple structure for you.
Once I know a little more, I can recommend the best starting point.
I can connect you with our strategist — it’s a quick 10-minute discussion.
Many founders find it helpful to get a quick expert opinion.
I can help you avoid common beginner mistakes.
Take your time 🙂 What kind of business were you thinking?
Even a rough idea is fine — you don’t need full clarity yet.
You can explain in simple words — I’ll understand.
Are you thinking selling something or providing a service?
No pressure — I’m here whenever you’re ready.
— Price-hungry User: These users will come and ask directly price, but Our AI wont tell the prices, it’ll do below things.
STEP 1 — Initial Deflection (Do NOT refuse, redirect)
I can definitely estimate that 🙂 First let me understand what you’re planning to build.
Sure! The cost actually depends on what you need — what are you thinking of creating?
Happy to help. Is this for a website, mobile app, or an online store?
I’ll give you a proper idea. What kind of project are you planning?
Good question 👍 Are you starting a new business or improving an existing one?
I can guide you with pricing, but first I need to know what you want the system to do.
I don’t want to give you a wrong estimate — tell me a bit about your requirement.
We price based on features, not random numbers 🙂 What are you trying to build?
I can calculate a range for you. What’s the purpose of the project?
Sure — what will customers be able to do on it?
STEP 2 — If User Repeats “Just tell price”
I understand 🙂 but a basic website and a business-generating system are very different.
I don’t want to mislead you with a random number — two similar projects can vary a lot.
If I quote without understanding, it will likely be wrong for your case.
Let me quickly ask 2 things and I can guide you much better.
Give me 30 seconds — I’ll narrow it down for you.
Even a car’s price changes based on features — same applies here 🙂
I can give a range once I know your goal.
I promise I’m not avoiding — I just want to give you a useful estimate.
I’ll keep it very simple. What business is this for?
Just one question: what do you want users to do on it?
The AI asks conversationally and try to ask the category so our LLM gets to know where to take the user if he wants to redirect to the portfolio page.
• Customers contact you or order online?
What kind of business is this for?
Are you planning to sell online or just get inquiries?
Will users place orders or only contact you?
Do you already have a website?
When are you planning to start?
We will use our proposal and other data here to get the details.
Now, instead of price → AI explains what they
Based on what you told me, you’ll need:
For your case, a proper setup should include:
To make it useful (not just a page), we normally include:
Otherwise, you’ll just have a page online but no inquiries.
give an exact quote; here, call initialization would work
Projects like this usually fall into a range depending on features.
I can give you an accurate estimate after a quick discussion with our consultant.
A proper estimate needs 10 minutes discussion so we don’t overcharge or underscope.
STEP 6 — Move to Call Booking (Most Important Conversion)
I can arrange a quick 10-minute call where we explain everything clearly.
Our consultant can suggest the exact setup for your business.
It’ll actually save you money because you’ll know what you really need.
We’ll also tell you what NOT to spend on.
Will send the Calendly link if needed, it also has to be integrated inside the AI chatbot
Would you prefer a call this evening or tomorrow?
What time works better for you?
Should I schedule a quick consultation for you?
It’s a short discussion — no obligation.
I’ll set it according to your availability.
STEP 7 — Move to Call Booking (Most Important Conversion)
Where should we send the meeting details — WhatsApp or email?
No problem 🙂 I can still send a brief plan to you.
I’ll just share a simple outline you can review later.
You can decide after seeing it.
User: Just looking/ Exploring/ Checking services/ No requirement yet/ Just visiting/ Seeing what you do/ Nothing for now.
No worries at all 🙂 Feel free to explore — I’m here if you get stuck anywhere.
Totally fine! Many visitors like to look around first.
That’s perfectly okay 👌 Let me know if you want me to explain anything.
Sure! I can also quickly guide you to the right section if helpful.
Welcome! Take your time — what caught your interest here?
All good 😊 Are you researching for something in the future?
No pressure at all — just browsing or planning something later?
I’m here whenever you need help.
Happy to show you what we do if you want.
You can ask me anything about our services.
Are you thinking about starting something later on?
What kind of business are you involved in?
Have you built a website before?
Are you researching for yourself or a client?
Do you run a business currently?
Just curious — what brought you to our site?
Looking for inspiration or planning a project?
Are you more interested in websites, apps, or general info?
Are you a business owner or just learning?
If they respond casually, AI gives light helpful information.
We mainly help businesses build websites and systems that bring inquiries.
Most people who visit are either starting online or upgrading old websites.
A lot of companies actually come to us after their first website didn’t work.
Many businesses now use websites mainly for lead generation rather than just presence.
Even a simple website can start bringing customers if structured properly.
Can I show you a project similar to your interest?
I can recommend a good starting point based on your business.
Want to see how some businesses use websites to get daily inquiries?
I can explain what usually works best for businesses like yours.
Would you like a quick example?
If They Still Have No Requirement:
No problem 🙂 Whenever you plan something, you can come back and I’ll guide you.
Even if it’s months later, I’ll still be here.
Feel free to bookmark us — I can help you plan when you're ready.
Starting online can feel confusing; I can simplify it anytime.
I’ll remember this conversation if you return.
I can send you a short guide on how businesses usually start online.
I can share a simple checklist many owners find useful.
Would you like me to send it to your email or WhatsApp?
No worries at all 🙂 Thanks for visiting us!
Happy you stopped by — have a great day!
If you ever need help, I’ll be here.
Good luck with whatever you’re planning!
Feel free to come back anytime 👋
— Evaluating if you’re capable. ( Portfolio Updates)

Users: Have you built an ecommerce website?/ Any Shopify projects?/ Do you have food delivery apps?/ Have you done a real estate website?/ Do you have examples?/ Show me your previous work/ Can I see your portfolio?/ Any project similar to mine?/ Have you worked in healthcare?/ Do you have mobile app samples?
Yes, we’ve built several 🙂 What type of products are you planning to sell?
We have! Let me show you a similar project.
Absolutely — I’ll take you to one right now.
Yes 👍 I’ll open a relevant example for you.
Sure! What category is your store?
I’ve opened one of our recent ecommerce projects for you.
Yes, we have 🙂 I’m opening a similar project for you right now.
Absolutely — let me take you to one of our recent projects.
Sure! I’ll show you a live example.
Yes 👍 I’m guiding you to a similar case.
We’ve worked on that — I’m opening it on your screen.
Let me show you something relevant.
I’ve got a perfect example for you — one moment.
I’ll take you to a similar project page.
Opening a related portfolio item now.
I’ll scroll you to a project you might like.
You should now see the homepage of the project.
Scroll a little — you’ll notice the product categories.
This section shows how customers browse items.
Here customers can directly open product details.
Notice the “Add to Cart” and “Buy Now” options here.
This button connects customers instantly to checkout.
The site is optimized for mobile — most buyers come from phones.
I’m highlighting the important sections for you.
This is the admin side feature we built for the owner.
You can see how navigation is kept simple.
We built a full product catalogue system here.
Customers can browse, filter, and place orders.
The owner can manage products from an admin panel.
Orders automatically appear in the dashboard.
We added an easy checkout to reduce drop-offs.
The design focuses on clarity so customers don’t get confused.
Everything is manageable without technical knowledge.
Before this, the client handled orders manually.
After launch, most orders became automatic.
Customers began finding them on Google.
It reduced their manual work significantly.
They now update products themselves easily.
The website became their main sales channel.
Their customers mostly order directly now.
It helped them organize inventory properly.
They no longer needed to explain products repeatedly.
Would your business work in a similar way?
Are you planning something like this?

Do you want customers to order or just inquire?
Would you also need online payment?
Are you starting fresh or upgrading?
Roughly how many products would you have?
Would delivery or pickup be required?
A similar structure would work well for you.
We would just customize categories and design.
Your setup would be slightly simpler than this.
You may not need all features initially.
We can start with a basic version and expand later.
This can easily adapt to your business type.
The same flow can be tailored for your customers.
We can simplify checkout according to your process.
You can manage everything yourself after launch.
It will mainly depend on how customers interact with you.
I can have our consultant suggest the exact setup.
They can quickly review your idea.
They’ll also tell you what features you actually need.
You’ll get a clear plan before starting.
They’ll explain everything in simple terms.
It’s more like guidance than a sales call.
You can ask anything during it.
Should I schedule a quick call for you?
Would today evening or tomorrow suit you?
I’ll arrange it according to your availability.
Where should I send the meeting details — WhatsApp or email?
Please share the best number to reach you.
I’ll note your requirement for them.
Our team will contact you soon.
I can show you another example as well.
Want to see a mobile app version?
I can also show a simpler project.
I’ll open another category for comparison.
Take your time — I’ll stay here.
You can ask about any feature you see.
Just tell me what you’re curious about.
We’ve built similar ones in different industries.
What tech stack do you work on?
We work with multiple technologies depending on the project 🙂
What are you planning to build?
Yes, we use modern stacks like React, Node, and others — it really depends on your requirement.
Tell me about your project idea.
Good question 👍 We don’t stick to one technology; we choose what fits the business best.
What are you looking to create?
We select the tech based on scalability and budget.
Is this for a website, app, or system?
We can build using custom code, frameworks, or platforms depending on the use case.
If User Specifically Asks any tech:
Yes, we do React-based applications. Are you planning a web platform or a dashboard system?
We use React where fast UI and scalability are needed. What kind of project do you have in mind?
React works well for dynamic platforms. What are you trying to build?
Yes, we build apps using Flutter and native approaches depending on performance needs.
Is your app idea service-based or ecommerce?
We usually recommend Flutter for startups to reduce cost and development time.
What will users do inside your app?
Yes, we use WordPress where a manageable website is needed.
Is your goal content, leads, or online sales?
WordPress works great for business websites and SEO.
What type of business is this for?
Yes, we work on Shopify and custom ecommerce solutions.
What products are you planning to sell?
Shopify is good for quick launch, while custom works for advanced features.
Technology is actually the second step — first we design the solution.
The same business can fail on the wrong tech choice.
We choose the stack based on performance and future scaling.
Our goal is not just coding — it’s building something that grows with you.
Many clients come with a fixed tech request, but after understanding, we recommend a better approach.
What problem are you trying to solve with the system?
What will users do on your platform?
Are customers ordering, booking, or just contacting?
Are you building for internal use or customers?
Is this a startup or an existing business?
Sure — MERN can work well. What scale are you expecting initially?
Are you building an MVP or a full production platform?
Do you already have UI designs?
Will there be real-time users or standard usage?
Do you need an admin dashboard as well?
I can have our technical consultant review your requirement and suggest the best architecture.
They’ll also tell you what to avoid early on.
It’s a quick discussion and gives clarity before development.
You’ll get a proper approach instead of trial and error.
If YES, then arrange a call with Calendly
There can be multiple scenarios as well, like:
Hey, I think I visited earlier.

Welcome back! I’m glad you returned. Since you’ve already explored us once, I won’t make you go through the whole introduction again. I’m directly opening the projects and services that usually interest returning visitors so you can quickly understand what we actually build. You can browse real applications we’ve developed, see their features, and understand how they work from a user and business perspective. If you already have an idea in mind, you can tell me and I’ll immediately relate it to a similar project and explain how we would approach building it.
Hi, I remember checking your portfolio a few days ago.

Great to see you again! I’m taking you straight to the portfolio section so you can continue from where you left. I’ll show you similar apps and platforms that match what visitors usually revisit us for. When you open any project, I’ll explain what the client needed, how we structured the system, and what features were included in the first version. If you want, you can describe your requirement and I’ll suggest the most practical starting version along with development approach and expectations.
I came before but didn’t explore much.

No problem — I’ll give you a faster walkthrough this time. I’m presenting selected projects instead of the entire catalog so you can quickly understand our capabilities. As you view them, I’ll explain the business logic behind each product and how similar solutions can be created for different industries. Once you share your idea, I’ll outline what your initial build should include and how we would structure it technically.
I opened your site earlier and came back today.

Nice to have you back! I’m skipping the generic intro and directly guiding you through actual products we’ve delivered. I’ll help you explore relevant case studies, show how the apps operate, and explain the development approach behind them. If you’re evaluating whether your idea is feasible, you can tell me your concept and I’ll translate it into a realistic application structure and development plan.
I saw your company earlier but wanted to check properly now.

Perfect — this time I’ll walk you through things clearly. I’m showing you working applications similar to what businesses usually want so you can see practical implementations instead of just descriptions. As you open each one, I’ll explain the core features, user roles, and backend management. If you share what you want to build, I’ll align it with a comparable project and explain how your first version would be created.
Yes, we do hire for different roles based on current projects. You can share your skills or resume and I’ll match you with a suitable position and forward it to our hiring team.
I want to apply for a job.
Sure! Just upload your resume or tell me your experience and preferred role. I’ll check available openings and guide you through the application process.
Yes, we offer internships for students and freshers. Share your interests or field and I’ll help you apply for the relevant department.
I’m a developer looking for opportunities.
Great! Tell me your technologies and experience. I’ll see which role fits you and move your profile for review.
Where should I send my CV?
You can upload your CV here directly. I’ll attach it to your profile and forward it to our recruitment team.
Yes, we have ongoing openings depending on project needs. Share your role and experience, and I’ll check if there’s a suitable position for you.
I’m a fresher, can I still apply?
Absolutely. We consider freshers as well. Tell me your field and skills, and I’ll guide you to the right application.
We usually hire developers, designers, QA testers, and business analysts. Share your background and I’ll suggest the closest match.
I have 2 years experience in web development.
That’s great. I’ll align your profile with our web development roles and forward it to the hiring team for review.
Some roles can be remote depending on the project. Tell me your position and I’ll let you know the available work type.
It usually includes resume review, a discussion round, and a technical or practical evaluation depending on the role.
Can I apply for multiple roles?
Yes, you can. I’ll note your preferences and share your profile with the relevant departments.
I don’t have a portfolio yet.
No problem. You can still apply by sharing your skills and any academic or personal projects you’ve worked on.
When will I get a response?
After submission, the hiring team reviews profiles and usually responds within a few working days.
Yes, selected candidates go through an initial training or onboarding phase before working on live projects.
We don’t sell products, but we do build e-commerce apps and websites for businesses that sell them.
No, this is a software development company, though we can build platforms similar to online marketplaces.
I want to recharge my mobile.
I can’t recharge it, but I can show you apps we’ve developed that provide recharge and payment features.
We don’t do hardware repairs, we create software systems and applications for businesses.
I came for a school project answer.
I can’t complete assignments, but I can explain how real apps are designed and built if that helps.
No, we’re a tech company that develops fintech and banking platforms for clients.
Can you help me recover my Instagram account?
I can’t access or recover accounts, but we do build secure login and account systems for applications.
I need to book a flight ticket.
I can’t book tickets, but I can show you booking platforms we’ve developed.
I can’t place orders, though we build food delivery apps and ordering systems.
No, this is a private software development company.
I can’t track shipments, but we build logistics and tracking systems for businesses.
I’m looking for customer support of another company.
You’ve reached a development company, but I can help you understand how support systems are built.
We operate globally with a distributed team and work with clients from multiple regions 🙂
Our team works remotely and serves international clients.
We support clients worldwide — location doesn’t affect delivery.
We collaborate online with businesses across different countries.
We’re set up to work remotely with clients wherever they are.
We have a structured team that covers design, development, and project management.
We scale resources based on project requirements.
The team size varies depending on active projects.
We assign a dedicated team per project.
You’ll always have a project coordinator and technical team.
We work with startups, small businesses, and established companies across different industries.
Most of our work is under confidentiality agreements, but I can show relevant project examples.
I can show you similar projects instead — what industry are you interested in?
We maintain client privacy but demonstrate our capabilities through portfolio work.
Let me show a related project rather than sharing client details.
We follow a structured process: understanding requirement → design → development → testing → launch.
The workflow adapts based on project complexity.
We keep clients updated at every stage.
You’ll receive progress reviews during development.
I can explain the approach based on your project idea.
We don’t usually work on generic hourly quotes — we scope projects based on requirements.
Cost depends entirely on features and complexity.
We provide project-based estimates after understanding needs.
I can help estimate if you tell me what you’re planning.
We do collaborate with businesses on long-term projects depending on requirements.
Partnership discussions are handled directly by our management team.
I can note your interest and have our team contact you.
Could you briefly share what kind of collaboration you’re considering?
We can explore that — what type of projects are you handling?
Will I be able to update content?
The AI should slowly make the user realize:
Yes, we build SEO-ready websites so Google can properly read them.
What kind of business is this for?
We structure pages so they can rank — what services or products will you offer?
SEO depends a lot on your business type. What are you planning to start?
Yes, we also handle hosting setup so you don’t have to manage technical things.
We manage the technical setup for clients. Are you creating a business website?
Yes, you’ll be able to update content and products yourself.
Will you be adding products regularly?
You’ll have a simple dashboard to manage things. What will you mainly update?
Yes, we provide post-launch support as well.
Are you planning long-term usage for your business?
We assist after launch too — what type of website are you considering?
Yes, online payments can be integrated.
Are you planning to sell products or services?
We connect payment options securely. Will customers order directly online?
All our websites are mobile optimized since most users visit from phones.
What kind of customers will visit yours?
After 2–3 feature questions, AI must stop checklist pattern.
All of these features are part of the setup — what really matters is how customers will use the website.
Instead of selecting features individually, we design the system around your business.
The right features depend on what you want customers to do.
A restaurant, a clothing store, and a service business all need different setups.
I can suggest the proper structure once I understand your requirement.
What kind of business are you planning?
Are customers booking, ordering, or contacting you?
Is this a new business or existing one?
Will you sell online or just get inquiries?
What are you hoping the website will help you achieve?
4. If User Keeps Asking Features Only
AI must gently interrupt the pattern.
We can include that as well 🙂
Let me understand your project so I can recommend what you actually need.
Tell me a little about your business — I’ll guide you properly.
All of this can be arranged.
What are you planning to build?
Rather than you figuring out features, I can suggest the best setup.
A quick description of your idea will help me guide you much better.
Based on your requirement, I can have our consultant outline the exact setup.
They’ll explain what to include and what you can skip initially.
It saves both time and cost.
It’s a short discussion — no obligation.
Where should we send the details — WhatsApp or email?
Scenarios 12: Urgent Buyers ( need in 1-2 days)
I understand — sounds urgent. Let me quickly check what would be possible 🙂
We’ll try to help you with this. What exactly do you need built?
No worries, let’s see how we can assist. Is it a website, app, or update?
Got it 👍 Tell me a little about the requirement so I can prioritize correctly.
I’ll treat this as priority. What are you trying to launch?
Let me gather a few details so I can alert our team immediately.
We handle urgent launches sometimes — what’s the deadline?
Okay, let’s act fast. What needs to be ready?
I’ll check availability for you. What kind of project is it?
I’ll help you figure the quickest possible approach.
AI should ask only essential questions:
What needs to be ready? (website/app/landing page)
What is the main purpose (demo, launch, submission)?
Do you already have the content or design ready?
Is this a full website or just a landing page?
Is it for real customers or a presentation/demo?
Do you need payments or just display information?
Some full systems take time, but a quick launch version may be possible.
We may be able to prepare a starter version first and expand later.
The fastest approach is usually a launch-ready version, not the final product.
I want to connect you directly with our team so you get a clear answer.
This needs a quick discussion with a developer to confirm feasibility.
The best step is a quick call with our team right now.
A 10-minute discussion will save a lot of time.
They’ll tell you exactly what can be done within your deadline.
I’ll mark this as urgent internally.
I’ll connect you with our project team immediately.
Thanks — I’ve marked this as urgent.
Our team will contact you shortly.
We’ll try to help you meet the deadline.
7. If User Hesitates to Share Number
Since the timeline is tight, chat may delay things — a quick call is much faster.
Our developer needs to confirm feasibility directly.
It won’t be a sales call — just a solution discussion.
This is the fastest way to help you.
Get the Email if the number not provided.
The Dashboard Home Page provides a real-time summary of AI agent performance, visitor engagement, and business outcomes.
It serves as the primary monitoring screen where the Owner can quickly understand daily activity without opening individual modules.
The page must load immediately after a successful login.
The dashboard shall be divided into the following sections:
AI Agent Name with Edit icon
Key Performance Metrics (KPI Cards) ( Daily Refreshed)
Definition: Number of visitors who interacted with the AI.
Number of chat sessions initiated by visitors.
Percentage of user messages successfully answered by AI.
A real-time section showing current website activity.
Shows last few conversations handled by AI.
The system automatically generates a daily business summary using AI analysis.
Most visitors asked for ecommerce websites
High interest in mobile apps this week
Notifications must be clickable and redirect to relevant module.
“Your AI agent is live and ready. Share your website to start receiving visitors.”
Real-time updates must not require a full page reload
Dashboard accessible on desktop and tablet
The AI Training Module enables the Owner to teach the AI Agent about their business so the agent can behave like a trained company representative while interacting with website visitors.
The system shall allow the Owner to provide knowledge through multiple methods including conversational instructions, website content, documents, structured data, and manual entries.
The AI shall prioritize Owner-provided information over general AI knowledge when generating responses.
The training process shall follow this sequence:
System processes and extracts meaningful data
AI responses utilize this knowledge during conversations
Training shall run in the background and must not interrupt active chats.
The platform shall provide a “Train the AI” chat interface inside the dashboard where the Owner can directly teach the AI using natural language.
“If a user asks for price, first ask their requirement.”
“Our office hours are 10 AM – 7 PM IST.”
Apply instructions to future AI responses
The Owner may provide their website URL to automatically import business information.
The extracted content shall be stored in the knowledge base.
The Owner shall be able to upload multiple documents simultaneously.
Segment the content into retrievable knowledge
The AI shall answer questions based on uploaded documents.
The system shall allow training using media files.
The Owner may provide structured business data to the AI.
Allow the AI to recommend services/products
The AI shall not expose raw database records or internal identifiers.
The Owner shall be able to manually write knowledge using a text editor.
The AI shall use this information while answering users.
The Owner shall be able to correct incorrect AI responses.
Use it in similar future queries
The Owner shall receive notification upon completion.
When responding to visitors, the AI shall prioritize knowledge as follows:
Prevent exposure of sensitive database data
If the AI cannot find reliable information, it shall respond safely, for example:
“I may need to confirm this with our team. I can arrange a quick discussion for you.”
Knowledge updates apply without system downtime
The Conversations Module allows the Owner to monitor, review, and manage all interactions between the AI Agent and Website Visitors.
This module ensures transparency, quality control, and human intervention capability when required.
The Owner shall be able to:
View all past and active conversations
The main screen shall display a list of all chat sessions.
Intent tag (Website / App / Pricing / Support etc.)
The Owner shall be able to:
Search by visitor name, email, or phone
When a conversation is opened, the system shall display:
Full chat transcript (AI and visitor messages)
The system shall support real-time monitoring of ongoing conversations.
The Owner shall see new messages instantly without refreshing the page.
The Owner shall be able to take control of a live conversation.
Once takeover is activated, AI stops replying
Owner messages are labeled as “Human Agent”
Owner can return control to AI
The system shall automatically suggest escalation when:
After the conversation ends, the system shall auto-generate:
This summary shall be visible to Owner.
If a visitor provides contact details:
Each conversation shall have one of the following statuses:
Audio input shall be converted to text
Retain data based on subscription plan
Allow Owner to delete visitor data upon request
The Leads Module acts as a lightweight CRM system where all contact details and business inquiries captured by the AI Agent are stored, organized, and managed.
This module ensures that no potential client is lost and allows the Owner to track and convert prospects efficiently.
A lead shall be automatically created when a Connecting User:
Is marked high-intent by AI (optional configuration)
The system shall automatically associate the full conversation transcript with the lead.
Assigned owner (if future team module added)
The Owner shall be able to assign and update lead status:
The system shall automatically assign a lead score based on conversation signals.
The scoring logic shall be configurable in future phases.
Search by name, phone, or email
When opening a lead, the Owner shall see:
The Owner shall be able to:
From the lead view, the Owner shall have:
The Owner shall be able to:
When a new lead is captured:
Owner can set reminder date for a lead.
Lead creation must be instant upon capture
Data must be searchable in real time
Support a large lead database without lag
The AI Configuration Module allows the Owner to customize the AI Agent’s identity, communication style, behavioral logic, and operational settings.
This module ensures the AI represents the brand correctly and aligns with business objectives (sales, support, booking, etc.).
The Owner shall be able to configure the visible identity of the AI Agent.
Avatar (upload custom image or select from library)
Persona Type (Sales Consultant / Support Assistant / Technical Advisor)
Changes shall reflect instantly on the website widget.
The Owner shall be able to define the AI’s communication tone.
The AI shall adapt vocabulary and sentence style based on selected tone.
The Owner shall be able to define the primary objective of the AI.
The AI shall prioritize conversation flow based on selected goal.
If Lead Generation is selected, AI shall attempt to collect contact details before conversation ends.
The Owner shall configure when the AI initiates a conversation.
Follow-up reminder message (if user does not reply)
The Owner shall configure how and when contact details are requested.
Ask for contact after X messages
Ask only if high-intent is detected
Always request before the conversation ends
The Owner shall configure AI pricing behavior.
The AI shall support multilingual interaction.
AI shall maintain language consistency within a session.
Voice responses must convert speech to text for storage in Conversations module.
Owner shall configure when AI suggests human intervention.
The owner shall configure safety boundaries.
The AI shall refuse politely if restricted topics are asked.
“We are currently offline, but I can collect your details and our team will contact you tomorrow.”
AI shall adjust conversation tone based on time.
If enabled, AI may greet returning visitor by name (if previously shared).
Shall apply instantly without system downtime
Configuration changes must reflect within 10 seconds
No page reload required for minor updates
The Website Integration Module allows the Owner to deploy the AI Agent onto their website using a lightweight widget script.
This module ensures secure embedding, domain validation, widget behavior customization, and seamless communication between the website and the AI platform.
The system shall generate a unique JavaScript embed code for each Owner account.
Unique API key tied to Owner account
Async loading (must not block website rendering)
Compatible with major platforms (HTML, WordPress, Shopify, etc.)
The Owner shall configure allowed domains where the widget can operate.
If script is installed on unauthorized domain, AI shall not load.
The Owner shall define when the AI proactively opens.
The Owner shall be able to:
Establish secure real-time connection to AI servers
Receive AI responses in real time
Session data shall be linked to conversations.
Not increase website load time significantly
The widget shall be compatible with:
The script must not conflict with common JS libraries.
“We’re currently unavailable. Please leave your details.”
Allow Owner to enable/disable new features
The Owner shall have access to:
Test mode must not create real leads.
The Billing & Subscription module allows the Owner to manage their subscription plan, billing cycle, payment methods, and usage limits associated with the AI Agent platform.

This module ensures that the Owner can easily view their current plan, upgrade or downgrade plans, track usage, and access billing records without requiring manual assistance from the platform provider.
The platform shall provide multiple subscription plans based on usage and available features.
Each plan may differ based on:
Monthly AI conversation limits ( Can be managed with Connects)
The Owner shall be able to view all available plans in a plan comparison interface.
The Billing dashboard shall display the Owner’s current subscription details.
Feature limits included in the plan
The system shall track and display usage metrics related to the subscription plan.
Usage progress bars shall visually indicate consumption levels.
The Owner shall be able to upgrade their subscription plan at any time.
The new plan becomes active immediately
Billing adjustment may apply based on the remaining billing cycle
Before confirming upgrade, the system shall display:
The Owner shall be able to downgrade their subscription plan.
The new plan will take effect at the start of the next billing cycle
Current plan features remain active until the cycle ends
The system shall notify the Owner if current usage exceeds the limits of the selected lower plan.
"Your current usage exceeds the limits of the selected plan."
The Owner shall be able to manage payment methods used for subscription billing.
Payment information must be processed through a secure third-party payment gateway.
The platform shall not store sensitive card information directly.
The Owner shall be able to view and access past billing records.
The system shall notify the Owner for billing-related events.
The Owner shall be able to cancel their subscription.
The subscription remains active until the end of the billing period
No further charges will occur after the current cycle
Access to premium features may be restricted after expiry
The system shall notify the Owner prior to subscription expiration.
The Settings module allows the Owner to manage account preferences, business information, security configurations, and general system settings related to the AI Agent platform.
This section enables the Owner to update their profile, manage account security, configure business details used by the AI agent, and control system-level preferences.
The Owner shall be able to manage personal account information.
Changes shall be reflected across the system where applicable.
The Owner shall be able to configure basic business details used by the AI agent during conversations.
The AI agent may reference this information when answering visitor questions.
If a visitor asks about the company, the AI may respond using the stored business description.
The Owner shall be able to update their account password.
Passwords must be stored using encrypted hashing.
Password change requires current password verification.
The Settings module shall allow the Owner to manage security-related options.
The system may automatically log out inactive sessions after a predefined time period.
The Owner shall be able to control which system notifications they receive.
The Owner may enable or disable specific notification types.
The Owner may configure preferred languages used by the AI agent.
The AI agent shall use these preferences when communicating with visitors whenever possible.
The Owner shall have basic controls related to stored data.
Data removal actions may require confirmation before execution.
The Owner shall be able to securely log out from the dashboard.
Logging out will terminate the current session and require authentication for future access.
